risk_factors: Margins are razor-thin — a single moment likely settles it.
Model confidence is modest (29/100) — wide outcome spread.

reasons: Kylian Mbappé (FW) is fit and firing — in 10.0/10 form, 18 goals in his last 5, at 100% fitness.
France's attack (rating 3.5) projects to break down England's back line (concedes ~0.9/game).
The ensemble (Elo + Dixon-Coles + XGBoost + market) makes France a 41% favourite to win.
explainability.why_penalties: A shootout is unlikely (14%) — one side should settle it inside 120'.
explainability.what_could_change: An early goal swings momentum; an injury to France's key creator, or England stealing a set-piece, flips it.
